description: Automata provides a market intelligence service that returns related companies, search results, and content-based similarity data. Its published API focuses on company discovery and related article/content matching.
summary: byautomata.io exposes one public developer integration surface: the Automata Market Intelligence HTTP API at `https://api.byautomata.io`, documented with an OpenAPI spec and authenticated by an Automata-issued API key in the `x-api-key` header.
